title: Support concat on LHS assignment in constant functions

features.name: concat on LHS of assignment in constant function
features.description: Code should include a concatenation on the left-hand side of an assignment inside a constant function with a for loop

features.name: indexing unpacked array with function argument inside constant function
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array indexed by a function argument inside a constant function

features.name: constant function with for loop and non-simple variable LHS
features.description: Code should include a constant function containing a for loop that assigns to array elements indexed by function arguments
